posts.author: TSA (Andrea Fantini)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I think for teams project added in a new view of different tables, i.e. with different column headings, what do you think? for example it would be perfect for us. example, create a new form dedicated to a project and subdivide for each view, for example a view with a table with technical information of the project with related fields, then a new view with a table dedicated to “issues” with dedicated fields etc. etc.

thanks !
A.
